positive: A whimsical, abstract celestial forest scene, characterized by giant bioluminescent flora and winding, glowing roots. The main subject is a stylized, serene lunar landscape nestled within the forest canopy. Use strong, contrasting colors: deep indigo and midnight blue contrasted with vibrant ethereal teal, glowing cyan, and soft lavender. The composition must be perfectly circular and centered, optimized for a repeating, single-panel apparel print. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with minimalist sci-fi illustration. Lighting: Dramatic, backlighting from the luminous plants creates strong silhouettes. Emphasize clean lines, high contrast, and a sense of peaceful wonder. Vector art quality, 4k, perfect symmetry, highly detailed, matte finish.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, lowres, text, watermark, signature, out of frame, bad anatomy, ugly, extra limbs, poorly drawn, photographic, photorealism
